title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Goa Tourism Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Goa Tourism Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Goa Tourism Holdings Services in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Goa Tourism Holdings Services:
Goa Tourism Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goa Tourism Holdings Services!
